title: Komm Susser Tod music video
wikitext:
[]: Komm Susser Tod music video?             Quote Post by gwern » Sat Jul 23, 2011 3:35 pm I was randomly linking KsT to someone and grabbed http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JmZBOY6Mczk on YouTube; later I remembered there was something odd about it and checked. What exactly is this? It has a MTV logo frequently, it opens with music-video-like metadata, it has Japanese subtitles, and it's not any section of EoE I recognize. It's all done pretty professionally, the low quality of the upload aside, with none of the usual glaring AMV mistakes or shortcuts. (The images do look like they came from somewhere in NGE TV or EoE, but there are a few exceptions - at 2:55 does anyone recognize this double shot of Kaworu & Rei with shadowed crowds in the background? The Eva-shaped cloud at 3:27 doesn't look familiar either. 4:45, with a ghost Rei floating in front of a petrified Eva 01, I also wonder about - we see ghost Reis so rarely that I thought I would have remembered this scene, but maybe not; ditto for the big zoom out from Earth past the Moon to Yui at 5:10) I thought it might have been from the Test Type DVD (http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2740) but I had specifically asked if there were any KsT videos and no one had said there were, so... Some random googling didn't turn up anything. My best guess is that KsT was shown on MTV Japan, but I'd never heard of this before and I'm not sure that this isn't some random AMV.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jul 23, 2011 4:05 pm Interesting finding, I'm not sure about it, surely it has professional looking overlay and metadata but the video has wrong AR. Anyway it looks like it's been completely sourced from EoE, these are the sequences that you were wondering about: gwern wrote: at 2:55 does anyone recognize this double shot of Kaworu & Rei with shadowed crowds in the background?

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sat Jul 23, 2011 4:55 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Anyway it looks like it's been completely sourced from EoE, these are the sequences that you were wondering about:

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jul 23, 2011 5:21 pm gwern wrote: Thanks for tracking down those shots. (However, I disagree about 'completely sourced' - aren't there a ton of shots from NGE TV?)

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sat Jul 23, 2011 5:36 pm 0:48 looks generic enough that it could be from anywhere. (How often does Shinji listen to his SDAT? A lot...) Obviously I don't know my visuals as well as you do. But how about the group at 2:57? Wasn't that EoTV? Or 0:31 - looks like the DC scene for Yui and Fuyutsuki. (I suppose some of the scribble flashes could be NGE TV but it'd be hard to check them one by one to see whether they were all in EoE.)

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jul 23, 2011 5:57 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sat Jul 23, 2011 6:15 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Everything in the video appeared in EoE. Shinji with the earbuds in is from early on, when they show that his SDAT's power has run out. I really doubt it's an AMV because it's so tepid and carefully has no spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jul 23, 2011 6:22 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 23, 2011 6:36 pm At first I thought maybe it was from one of these? http://svenge.pcriot.com/evasite/jpmusic/jpmusic.htm But it doesn't look that way. Interesting find...

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sat Jul 23, 2011 6:46 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: But if one hasn't seen the movie they don't know Misato is dying there, and they don't know that Shinji and Asuka on the beach is the end of the film instead of any random scene from early on. There's no GNR, no military assault, no MP Eva fight, no tanging...

[]: Re: Komm Susser Tod music video?             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Jul 23, 2011 7:03 pm gwern wrote: What exactly is this? It has a MTV logo frequently, it opens with music-video-like metadata, it has Japanese subtitles, and it's not any section of EoE I recognize.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jul 23, 2011 7:06 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Jul 23, 2011 7:36 pm I've seen this thumbnail several times, but I never clicked because it said 5:56 instead of 7:43. There's something strange that I noticed by the way, at 3:40 - 3:50, GNR appears to be fondling her own breasts. If memory serves me correctly, her hands were farther apart and she had visible nipples in the original. Possible censorship? And welcome back, LiLi! I haven't seen you in a while.

[]: Re: Komm Susser Tod music video?             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jul 23, 2011 9:02 pm LiLi wrote: FWIW the subs look like (some type of) Chinese to me. Ditto the Japanese title (in Japanese, as far as I can tell, "Komm, süßer Tod" seems to be commonly referred to as 「甘き死よ、　来たれ」 vs different ideograms used in the video w/ no hiragana.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 23, 2011 11:03 pm FWIW, information about the Japanese lyrics and people who worked on the song is here: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Komm_susser_tod

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sun Jul 24, 2011 3:26 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: 00:06:02 of EoE. [URL=http://img534.imageshack.us/img534/6995/snapshotdvd000602201107.png] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 26, 2011 10:18 am BornIn1142 wrote: Holy crap, that does look like an Eva. How did I never notice that?
